title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 60.060 - Bond valid until rejected
text:
60.060.  Bond valid until rejected. — Such bond shall be valid until it is rejected, and its rejection shall not release the principal and sureties from any liabilities incurred previous to its rejection.
(RSMo 1939 § 13195) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11576; 1919 § 12714; 1909 § 11296
